title: TerraFrimaCraftDarkGUI
description: A dark GUI for the mod TerraFrimaCraft
body:
## Dark GUI for TerraFirmaCraft

Couldn't find a dark GUI for TerraFrimaCraft anywhere so i just made it myself



This resourcepack is mainly made for my modpack for TerraFrimaCraft:

[TerraFirmaCraft Enhanced](https://modrinth.com/modpack/terrafirmacraftmodpack)

Doesn't fully work on the 1.21.1 version
